sacred trees, arches and gates), the place would be devastated.
If dogs bring bones or parts of dead bodies into houses, epide-
mics would break out soon; and if animals and weapons talk like
human beings, there would be the king's death. The following
remedial measures have been prescribed by the Sage (Garga).

For warding off the evil effects of the portents connected with
birds and beasts, sacrifices should be performed with liberal gifts
of money. Five Brahmanas should also repeat the hymn beginning
with the words. uDeoah kapotah73 and the one "Sudevah..." {vide
Valakhilya 6-4). Or, they may chant repeatedly the Sakuna hymn,
the prayer "Fa Mono..3' or the Atharva'siras. The priests should also
be presented with milch cows and liberal gifts of money.
[These two verses must be GargaJs, although they are printed
as those of Varahamihira.]
(11) Portents of Indra's Banner etc.
